A.rationale: A covers the main sections of the paper but struggles with logical hierarchy. For instance, '早期丢弃准则' (Early Discarding) is placed as a sibling to the '决策场景三维度' (Three Decision-Making Situations) instead of being one of them. It also mixes model-free and model-based approaches in the meta-learning section. While mostly concise, it includes overly specific details in the summary section (e.g., 120% overhead) rather than high-level takeaways, slightly affecting its accuracy in summarizing the paper's actual future directions.

B.rationale: B is an outstanding mind map that perfectly captures the paper's core contribution: the 3-axis framework (Decision situations, Data resources, Technical questions/complexity levels L1-L6). The hierarchy is extremely logical and aligns flawlessly with the paper's structure. The nodes are concise, professional, and bilingual where appropriate. The terminology is highly accurate and faithful to the source text, and the balance is excellent across all branches.
